description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Analyzers that runs on pull requests, push events, and published releases. The workflow checks if a duplicate action should be skipped, then runs a matrix of analysis jobs on ubuntu-latest and windows-latest environments. For each job, it checks out the repository, installs dependencies, configures the build, and performs analysis using various tools like CodeQL, Clang Analyzer, IWYU, and MSVC Code Analysis.
